reviews.title: What an Inn!
reviews.text: The best “inn” I’ve stayed in, by far. While only an “inn” do not be fooled by it - it’s like living in a 5-Star hotel, room wise. Very modern, beautiful view of sunset (I was lucky!) , super comfortable bed,  and luxurious amenities. Well-equipped kitchen and more than adequate refrigerator space.

reviews.title: Would stay somewhere else next time.
reviews.positives: Bathroom was dirty. Hotel going through a remodel so breakfast area was closed and moved to a different room.  Several of the breakfast items were not available such as oatmeal, which for someone with allergies, oatmeal is the only thing I could eat.  No bananas, regular coffee was out.

reviews.title: Disappointed in lack of staff or management supporting guests with the issues.
reviews.positives: AC was broken in lobby. Not nice for staff but not nice for enjoying breakfast. Fortunately there was the patio where it was cool in the morning. Waited one entire day to get hair dryer that was missing from room and still had to go to front desk. First day there was “warm” water then after that nothing but cold water. We were not informed and the staff was very nonchalant about the whole thing. No compassion, understanding just that is “how it is”. Difficult to speak to staff as there was always a line waiting for one person.
reviews.negatives: See first answer started with the negatives. There was one staff person in housekeeping that was kind. I opted out of cleaning room though as it was not necessary.

reviews.title: This stay was not the cleanest nor most comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: The hotel is close to the WSU campus.  We loved the initial ambiance of lobby- but our entire stay no one actually ever was there serving drinks etc.  So just don’t have any expectation that there is a service bar (I don’t think many would care, but it shouldn’t be advertised as such).
reviews.negatives:
I don’t like to rock the boat with unnecessary complaints  and I like to give folks the benefit of the doubt, but this stay was beyond disappointing.

The rooms were not very clean. There was dirt/ dust everywhere. The sheets and towels were clean but beyond that it’s like no one is actually cleaning the surfaces, showers or floors or the walls near the toilet.  There was what appeared to be urine on the wall. The mattress cover for the pullout couch was HEAVILY stained which grossed my 18 year old son out- which takes a lot to do. Not to mention the actual couch itself was dirty with various stains- food, body fluids who knows. In addition it was not even usable for a bed. My son can sleep almost anywhere but these pull out couches were the worst I’ve ever seen.  We had to take the mattress out and place on the floor and cover it completely with a blanket underneath the actual bedding. We would have booked another room for him- but not at these prices. Quite a few of the staff are still wearing masks so there seems to be a discrepancy with cleanliness/germ spread?

The beds and bedding were not great either. Just ok.

Now, let’s talk about the breakfast situation. Overall the three mornings we were there, it proved to be a waste of a trip to venture downstairs. The first morning we couldn’t even get milk, as they “ran out” and the hotel wasn’t even close to being full. Everyday it was a coin toss if you could get a cup of coffee- and if so, it was sure to be lukewarm.  The bagels and English muffins could have been mistaken for hockey pucks-BEFORE being toasted. It was as if the hotel was on a mission to make the breakfast situation a joke. Come on now- we weren’t asking for much, just hot cup of coffee and milk for cereal (as the sausage and bacon were not edible in my opinion knowing the cleanliness of the room we were afraid to eat the cooked food).

reviews.title: Stay was great except there was no hot water.cold showers two mornings in a row
reviews.positives: Located next to the stadium

reviews.title: Overall good value and worth the stay.
reviews.positives: Loved the indoor pool and breakfast. The rooms were spacious and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: The rooms were not very clean. The shower had stains which I was not accustomed to seeing at a hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent Location
reviews.positives: Situated at the end of campus and very close to my child's dorm. The outline of the room was exactly as advertised. Modern and spacious.  Having access to free breakfast if needed. Although standard, it was appreciated. The staff was always friendly and welcoming. The grounds and parking area was very clean and I felt safe.  The bed was comfortable and I slept like a rock.
reviews.negatives: Multiple stains on the carpet, so I was hesitant to walk around without socks. When I reported it, I wasn't offered another room, but was told it would be reported to housekeeping.  As I was checking for bedbugs (DIDN'T FIND ANY), but found  blood spot and what appeared to be ink spots on the comforter; didn't use them.   I travel often, and this is why I carry my own linens and light blanket with me.  I had to go around and wipe down counters and even the Kleenex holder; layer of dust.  The room smelled clean initially, but after 24 hours (my stay was for 48 hrs), it had a distinctive odor of dog which explains the stains on the carpet. It would have been nice to know upon check-in, for those that may have allergies.

reviews.title: Makes travel nicer than most places.
reviews.positives: Rooms are great.  Very nice layout.  Good kitchen space, great seperate work area if having to conduct some business.  Badroom and pathroom clean and spacious.
reviews.negatives: Couldn't connect to Wi-Fi.  Breakfast was ok not great.  They could do better in that area compared to other hotels

reviews.title: Nice place to stay
reviews.positives: Room layout is very nice for relaxing as well as doing business related work with large counterspace for laptop and laying down documents.  Very few places have room for both.  kitchens are large compared to most hotels.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was just OK.  Nothing special.

reviews.title: Good for a one or two night stay on campus.
reviews.positives:
Very nice suite with plenty of amenities and nice large bathroom.

Breakfast was decent.  A bit crowded and they staff was working hard to get enough plates and utensils out.  Seems like they could have used a couple more people to help out.  
Pool wasn't usable which was a bummer but the kids enjoyed the hot tub and small basketball court.
reviews.negatives: Had to pay for parking.  Seems odd being in the middle of nowhere, where there was plenty of space.

reviews.title: Good value nice property
reviews.positives: Staff was great

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Perfect all the way around!

reviews.title: Excellent facility with amenities of a 5 star hotel.  The staff was friendly and helpful.
reviews.positives: The hotel is close to my kids residence and activities in Pullman.  They pay great attention to detail and are our new favorite say over in Pullman.  There is good sound proofing and all the amenities of a nice apartment.
reviews.negatives: The upgrades needed in room 325 include a clicker for the TV that responds more effectively (we did not report this), better traction material on the shower floor, a more powerful shower head, a sliding shower door to trap in heat.

reviews.title: Very pleasant, would definitely stay here again
reviews.positives: Very nice modern building and room. A quiet, safe location .
reviews.negatives: Hallways needed vacuumed. The crib we requested ahead of time took 45 minutes and two more requests to arrive.

reviews.title: Great location centrally located to the events we attended on campus.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was fine. Offered early enough that we were able to eat on our get away day.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Great experience. perfect for our family of 6 to stay
Clean, thoughfully appointed.
reviews.negatives: Needed a shower door or better design. Could have used an extra blanket in the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Really large, great kitchen, comfy beds

reviews.title: It was exceptional!!!
reviews.positives: Everything was great.  Room, pool exercise room, breakfast.  very clean.  Great staff

reviews.title: Definitely would stay again!
reviews.positives: Took my son to look at WSU. GREAT location for that purpose. Very modern hotel. Rooms and lobby area were very nice.
reviews.negatives: The shower water temp was warm at best. Would have loved for it to be a little warmer. But literally that was the worst thing about the property.

reviews.title: We stayed two nights and were delighted they had a hot tub and pool.
reviews.positives: Close to campus

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: safe. nice space in the room. handy to have a kitchenette

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Room had kitchen so I was able to make own special diet food.
reviews.negatives: Room was over pool with no view. However I was not there much so I was fine with it. Especially considering the lower price. I would take it again for the price

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
매우 좋았다.
지인들이 pullman에 간다면 추천하겠다.
reviews.negatives:
조식이 조금 더 다양성이 있으면 좋겠다.
매일 같은 음식이었다.
